name: control-slipping
prompt: Close-up on brunette woman. Composure cracking, vulnerability showing through. Eyes glistening slightly. Soft warm bokeh behind — the moment intimate despite conflict. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting

name: come-with-me
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman close to camera, reaching forward with words. Behind her: cool blue room, man's silhouette visible. Asking for everything. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: Come with me. Forget the commissions. We walk out tonight and figure out the rest together.

name: his-response
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man, expression conflicted, torn. Cool blue room behind him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: And abandon everyone I swore to protect?
